description: HTTP JSON contracts for USB 2FA (dashboard ↔ FastAPI). Session cookie required for all calls after login.

response_200.requires_usb_2fa: boolean — true → session has pending_2fa_user_id only

response_200.challenge_hex: 64-char hex — 32 random bytes; client signs raw bytes via hex decode

POST /api/auth/usb/verify-signature.requires: same pending session + prior verify-token must succeed

request_body.signature_hex: 128-char hex — detached Ed25519 signature over bytes.fromhex(challenge_hex)

meta_json.user_id: integer — must match pending session user_id

usb_bundle_layout.key_enc_format: 12-byte nonce || AES-256-GCM ciphertext (includes 16-byte tag at end); matches dashboard/electron-main.js decrypt
